sections.paragraph:
- Original: Ἄππιος

- Transliteration: Appios

- Phonetic: ap'-pee-os

- Definition: Appius = "the market place of Appius"

1. a town in Italy, 39 miles (60 km) from Rome on the Appian Way

- Origin: of Latin origin

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Location

- Strong's: Of Latin origin; (in the genitive that is possessive case) of Appius the name of a Roman: - Appii.
